title: Brand DNA
description: Per-client brand DNA extracted by Stage 7 (brand-dna-agent). Consumed by Stage 9 (hero generation) and Stage 10.1 (template-overlay build via tools/build-from-template.py). Schema describes the universal shape every niche template's brand-dna.js must satisfy. Niche-specific extensions live under nicheExtensions.{slug}. Required fields: client_slug, company_name, company_tagline, region, shape_mode, shape_motif, theme_mode, voice_register, palette, typography, services, copy.

client_slug.description: URL-safe client identifier, used for client-data folder naming.

region.description: Service region, used by Nano Banana hero image generation for regional house style defaults.

shape_mode.description: Shape language. Sharp = zero radius (default), softened = subtle 4px, curved = 12px+. Currently informational only — website template uses sharp 0px radius across the board.

shape_motif.description: Background SVG pattern selector. The website template's BackgroundPattern component reads this to mount the matching pattern from src/assets/bg-patterns/{shape_motif}.svg. The ONE per-client visual variance allowed under template-approach. Default: polygon.

motif.description: Shape silhouette for decorative corner overlays. Anchored to section corners as ambient brand texture. Defaults to shape_motif so corners share visual language with the full-section BackgroundPattern. Use `rectangle` to get a flat block of accent tint instead of a geometric silhouette (useful for clients whose brand language reads cleaner as solid corner blocks). Both shape AND color vary per client per Rule 58.

color.description: Hex color for the corner overlay shape. Defaults to palette.accent so corners carry the per-client brand accent.

opacity.description: Opacity of the corner overlay shape. Lower for light section backgrounds (0.04-0.08), higher for darker (0.12-0.18). Default: 0.08.

corner_overlay.description: Per-client corner overlay system. Renders a single large motif-shaped silhouette at each section corner, tinted in palette.accent at low opacity. Both motif and color vary per client. See 09-build.md Rule 58 and brand-dna-agent.md Rule 5.

theme_mode.description: Single theme mode for the per-client build. NO toggle. Decided by brand-dna-agent based on logo brightness + brand-resonance.theme_mode_recommendation when present. Default: light.

voice_register.description: Copy tone hint consumed by Stage 6 copy-deck-agent. commercial = direct/industrial/insurance-focused, family = warm/owner-led/community, premium = restrained/heritage/high-touch. Default: family.

insurance_focus.description: How prominently insurance claims feature in the client's positioning. Dominant = lead with it, mentioned = secondary, absent = retail/cash market only.

accent_light.description: Patched in by tools/derive-accent-stops.py (HSL +18L -8S from accent)

accent_mid.description: Patched in by tools/derive-accent-stops.py (HSL -22L +6S from accent)

accent_dark.description: Patched in by tools/derive-accent-stops.py (HSL -42L +8S from accent)

surface.description: Page background colour. Cool off-white default (#F5F7FA) used by Stage 8 Claude design system if absent.

mono.description: Optional monospace font for technical labels. Stage 8 falls back to JetBrains Mono if absent.

mono_url.description: Optional Google Fonts URL segment for the mono font, e.g. 'JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600'.

path.description: Relative path to the logo file in client-data/[client]/assets/logo/

has_motif.description: True if logo contains a graphic mark (e.g. lightning bolt, mountain, shield).

motif_description.description: If has_motif is true, describe the mark for downstream prompt injection (hero image generation, background pattern selection).

bbb_rating.description: BBB letter grade (A+, A, B, etc.) or empty string when not researched / unlisted.

certifications.description: Per-client certification booleans. Which certs/affiliations matter (and which are required) is niche-driven: see templates/{active-niche-slug}/niche-playbook/trust-signals.json for the niche's curated badge library and match keywords. The property list below is the contractor / home-services default vocabulary; non-contractor niches may add their own boolean fields under additionalProperties.

first_name.description: First token of name. Used by Stage 13 proposal-builder for conversational copy ('{first name} will call within 5 minutes'). Set by brand-dna-agent.md Step 4 from research.ownerName.

cutout_path.description: Optional. Relative path to owner cutout PNG with transparent background. Set only when has_owner_cutout is true.

personal_guarantee_quote.description: First-person quote from the founder. ZERO em-dashes.

business_hours.description: Used by the niche template's persistent mobile CTA element to swap primary action between phone (in-hours) and form (after-hours). Sourced from GBP hours in research.json.

partner.description: Financing partner name. Empty string if enabled is false.

taglines.description: Short marketing taglines the build agent renders wherever the niche template surfaces them (trust strip rotations, footer, ticker, etc.).

manual_overrides.description: Per-client overrides recorded by Stage 1 intake or Stage 7 lessons (e.g. founder_photo_primary, segment_lean). Anything that should bypass auto-extraction lives here.

niche.description: Niche slug (from Module 2C `/pick-niche`). Resolves to the niche template at `templates/{niche}/` and the niche playbook at `templates/{niche}/niche-playbook/`. The factory uses this slug to find niche-specific values for every stage.

templateVersion.description: Version of the niche template + playbook used for this client build. Incremented by `/refine-template` after lessons-driven updates. The factory records the version with each build so regressions can be traced.

jsonLdType.description: Schema.org @type for the JSON-LD block. Set per niche by Module 2D (e.g. "RoofingContractor", "LodgingBusiness", "ProfessionalService", "Restaurant", "MedicalBusiness", "Store"). scripts/inject-theme.mjs reads this field; defaults to "LocalBusiness" if absent.

motion.description: Per-client motion overrides. The niche playbook's `motion-preset.json` is the default; values here override.

preset.description: Override the niche playbook's motion preset for this client.

tier2Enabled.description: Override the niche playbook's enabled Tier 2 patterns.

nicheExtensions.description: Per-niche extension fields keyed by niche slug. Schema for each niche's extension lives at templates/{niche}/niche-playbook/research-extensions.schema.json (if present). Example: nicheExtensions.{niche}.{field}.
